# Desktop Icons

**Do not hand-edit files in this directory.** The full bundle (per-size PNGs, `icon.icns`, `icon.ico`, Windows Store variants) is generated by Tauri's icon tool from a single source: `src/ui/public/images/logo-512.png`.

## Regenerate

```bash
bun run icons:regen
```

This wraps `bun x @tauri-apps/cli icon src/ui/public/images/logo-512.png --output src-tauri/icons` and overwrites every icon asset.

## Drift guard

`bun run desktop:validate-icons` asserts `md5(src-tauri/icons/512x512.png) == md5(src/ui/public/images/logo-512.png)`. It runs as part of `bun run validate`. If it fails: rerun `bun run icons:regen` and commit.

## Why

Hand-replacing individual icon files (as in PR #719) leaves most of the ~14 assets stale because macOS picks smaller sizes from `icon.icns`, Windows reads `icon.ico`, and Linux packages read the per-size PNG array. A single source + one regen command keeps every OS consistent.

## After shipping

A merged PR does NOT produce a usable desktop app. Cut a new `desktop-v*` tag (e.g. `desktop-v0.1.0-dev.3`) to trigger the release workflow.
